message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): comprehensive superblock geometry validation (bd-2w9)

Expand validate_geometry() to check:
- blocks_per_group and inodes_per_group upper bounds (bitmap capacity)
- inode_size fits within block_size
- desc_size range and 64BIT feature consistency
- first_data_block rules (must be 1 for 1K, 0 for >1K)
- group descriptor table fits within device bounds
- inodes_count does not exceed groups * inodes_per_group

Split into validate_geometry_fields() and validate_geometry_layout()
to stay under clippy's line limit. Add 12 new targeted tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
